posts.author: siva
posts.text: No code Algo trading — We have some plans around this, too early for me to commit on anything now. Maybe once we have something solid we will announce it.

posts.author: sn88
posts.text: No code Algo trading — Hello Zerodha Team, Is zerodha planning to launch any tool for No code deployment of algo trading? May be prompt based algo converted to trading strategies and deployment for order punching. I know we have streak onboard where with get notified on alerts. But can we expect something seamless with order punching capabilities with compliance to todays regulations. @siva Can you tag the correct team here?
